<!--
Thanks for contributing to CAP! Please fill in the sections below.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] **Protocol change** (touches request/response schema, headers, MCP tool inputs)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #N -->

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify your change? Commands, screenshots, or reproduction steps. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally (if tests apply)
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected code path

## Protocol checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] Linked Spec Proposal issue
- [ ] Updated `cap-spec/v0.x/cap-protocol.md` and `cap-spec/v0.x/openapi.yaml`
- [ ] Added entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `Protocol`
- [ ] Bumped spec version directory if breaking

## Reviewer notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should look at first, or known caveats. -->
